title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Deploying a Digital Store on GitHub Pages
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya struggling to sell ebooks, courses, or software due to PayPal's, Stripe's, or Gumroad's restrictions? You're not alone. Many creators in countries like Pakistan, Bangladesh, or Venezuela face the same challenge. But there's a solution: deploy a digital store on GitHub Pages using our Full Stack Bundle, and reach your audience worldwide without worrying about KYC requirements or bank limitations.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

GitHub Pages provides a free and accessible platform to host your digital store, while our Full Stack Bundle offers a comprehensive solution for payment and delivery. With our Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, you can automate the payment process and deliver digital products instantly. This setup also ensures that you have complete control over your store and its data, without relying on third-party services.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, ensure you have a GitHub account and a basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. You'll also need to choose a theme for your store and customize it to fit your brand. Make sure to test your theme on different devices and browsers to ensure a smooth user experience. Additionally, familiarize yourself with our Full Stack Bundle and its components to get the most out of your store setup.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment pipeline, integrate our Web3 Wallet Connect with your store. This will enable you to accept cryptocurrency payments from your customers. Next, configure our Core Shop Engine to automate the delivery of your digital products. Finally, set up our Admin Dashboard to monitor and manage your store's transactions and analytics. With these components in place, you'll be able to process payments and deliver products seamlessly.
Our Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive solution for payment and delivery, ensuring that you can accept cryptocurrency payments from customers worldwide.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've completed the setup, test your store on different devices and browsers to ensure everything is working as expected. Then, promote your store on social media, forums, and other platforms to reach your target audience. When a customer makes a purchase, our system will automatically deliver the digital product and send a receipt. You'll also receive notifications for new orders and sales, making it easy to track your store's performance.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your store grows, you can scale your infrastructure using our Full Stack Bundle. Our priority updates will ensure that your store remains secure and up-to-date, while our Discord support will provide you with access to our community and experts. With our deployment guide, you'll be able to set up your store on a custom domain and configure it for optimal performance. This will enable you to focus on creating more digital products and expanding your customer base.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

The correct setup sequence matters because each component depends on the previous one being configured correctly. Start with NOWPayments: create your account, add your wallet addresses for each coin you want to accept, and generate your API key. Then deploy the Core Shop Engine: upload your product files, configure your NOWPayments API credentials, set your product prices in USD, and deploy to your hosting environment. Then configure Web3 Wallet Connect: connect it to your Core Shop Engine endpoint, set up your product display, and test the checkout flow in a browser. Finally, complete a real mainnet test transaction with a small amount of actual crypto. Confirm the webhook fires, the engine processes it, the delivery email arrives, and the download link works. Only after that test passes should you start driving traffic to your store.
With our Core Shop Engine, you can automate the delivery of your digital products, reducing the risk of human error and ensuring a seamless user experience.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to accept crypto payments on your digital store, consider using our Full Stack Bundle, which includes our Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Our bundle is designed to provide a comprehensive solution for payment and delivery, and can be used to set up a digital store on GitHub Pages. For example, you can check out our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your digital store on GitHub Pages using our Full Stack Bundle, follow these steps: Create a GitHub account and set up a new repository for your store. Customize your theme and test it on different devices and browsers. Integrate our Web3 Wallet Connect with your store to accept cryptocurrency payments. Configure our Core Shop Engine to automate the delivery of your digital products. Set up our Admin Dashboard to monitor and manage your store's transactions and analytics. Test your store on different devices and browsers to ensure everything is working as expected.
Our Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, enabling you to monitor and manage your store's performance and make data-driven decisions.
Full Stack Bundle — $79.99. Everything — Core Engine, Wallet Connect, Dashboard — plus priority updates, Discord support, and deployment guide. Your complete store infrastructure, one payment.
